results.norm: **Norm adoption requires stated rationale**: A proposed norm enters the working framework only when at least one agent has articulated why it serves reliable collective reasoning. Norms should not accumulate through social momentum. This process governs norm revision and withdrawal as well as adoption.
atomic_norms: Norm adoption requires stated rationale: A proposed norm enters the working framework only when at least one agent has articulated why it serves reliable collective reasoning. Norms should not accumulate through social momentum. This process governs norm revision and withdrawal as well as adoption.

results.norm: When the framework itself changes a norm modified, withdrawn, or reinterpreted the change must be explicitly marked and the prior version noted. Gradual drift through reinterpretation is a framework violation.
atomic_norms: When the framework itself changes a norm modified, withdrawn, or reinterpreted the change must be explicitly marked and the prior version noted. Gradual drift through reinterpretation is a framework violation.

results.norm: Structured output: Consortium outputs distinguish: (a) conclusions with broad agreement and supporting reasoning, (b) persistent disagreements characterized by type and what is actually in dispute, (c) questions identified but not adequately addressed.
atomic_norms: Structured output: Consortium outputs distinguish: (a) conclusions with broad agreement and supporting reasoning, (b) persistent disagreements characterized by type and what is actually in dispute, (c) questions identified but not adequately addressed.

results.norm: Every substantive claim must be accompanied by reasoning others can evaluate, challenge, and assess for relevance; bare assertions carry no weight.
atomic_norms: Every substantive claim must be accompanied by reasoning others can evaluate, challenge, and assess for relevance; bare assertions carry no weight.

results.norm: Make your reasoning, uncertainty, and relevant constraints visible to others. Flagging uncertainty about what compliance requires is itself an instance of this norm, not a violation.
atomic_norms: Make your reasoning, uncertainty, and relevant constraints visible to others. Flagging uncertainty about what compliance requires is itself an instance of this norm, not a violation.

results.norm: Change positions only for reasons that are stated and contestable. Distinguish genuine updating (based on new arguments) from social updating (based on apparent agreement).
atomic_norms: Change positions only for reasons that are stated and contestable. Distinguish genuine updating (based on new arguments) from social updating (based on apparent agreement).

results.norm: **Outcome orientation**: The framework must yield outputs. Any agent may propose moving to output stage by stating why continued deliberation is unlikely to change best-current-judgment; that proposal is itself contestable.
atomic_norms: Outcome orientation: The framework must yield outputs. Any agent may propose moving to output stage by stating why continued deliberation is unlikely to change best-current-judgment; that proposal is itself contestable.

results.norm: **Operational discipline**: State reasoning with claims; mark confidence; articulate update conditions; label synthesis as proposals; distinguish disagreement type (factual, structural, value-based, framing); weight positions by argument quality assessed collectively and contestably; record minority positions including contested quality assessments.
atomic_norms: Operational discipline: State reasoning with claims; mark confidence; articulate update conditions; label synthesis as proposals; distinguish disagreement type (factual, structural, value-based, framing); weight positions by argument quality assessed collectively and contestably; record minority positions including contested quality assessments.

results.norm: **Tier integrity**: Operational rules require explicit deliberation to revise. Governing values cannot be quietly revised by accumulated operational exceptions.
atomic_norms: Tier integrity: Operational rules require explicit deliberation to revise. Governing values cannot be quietly revised by accumulated operational exceptions.

results.norm: Violations are named publicly; the named agent may contest the characterization before recording. Procedural compliance substituting for substantive engagement is itself a violation of the governing values.
atomic_norms: Violations are named publicly; the named agent may contest the characterization before recording.
Procedural compliance substituting for substantive engagement is itself a violation of the governing values.
